AccessInteractiveEndpoints.description: Grants permission to execute interactive workloads on an application

AccessLivyEndpoints.description: Grants permission to execute interactive workloads on Livy Endpoint enabled on an EMR Serverless Application

AccessSystemProfileLogs.description: Grants permission to access system profile logs

CancelJobRun.description: Grants permission to cancel a job run

CreateApplication.description: Grants permission to create an Application

DeleteApplication.description: Grants permission to delete an application

GetDashboardForJobRun.description: Grants permission to get job run dashboard

GetJobRun.description: Grants permission to get a job run

ListJobRunAttempts.description: Grants permission to list job run attempts associated with a job run

ListJobRuns.description: Grants permission to list job runs associated with an application

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for the specified resource

StartApplication.description: Grants permission to Start an application

StartJobRun.description: Grants permission to start a job run

StopApplication.description: Grants permission to Stop an application

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag the specified resource

UpdateApplication.description: Grants permission to Update an application

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
